prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.actor: edge-LLM model researcher at an open-weights frontier lab

prediction.4bd551bfc1cca138.motivation: Whichever runtime ships first-class 1-bit support becomes the default deployment target for the next wave of 1-bit derivatives.
